transcription.text: Motor oil lubricates the engine of your car, just like water wets your hands. And you just can't buy better lubrication than this oil. It's Esso Extra Motor Oil. And this oil has something extra. It has a detergent. It bathes your engine every mile you drive. You can see the dirt and gunk come out of the engine when you drain the oil. That's why it's so important to do two things. It's important to use an oil that helps to keep your engine clean. Use Esso Extra Motor Oil. And it's important to drain away dirty oil every thousand miles or so and refill with fresh, clean Esso Extra Motor Oil that bathes your engine every mile you drive. See your nearby Esso dealer.
